data.body:
## Completion Verification Report

**Verdict: PASS**

All three acceptance criteria are met. The prior FAIL (AC1: ticket graph feed absent) was remediated and the fix is confirmed in the code.

---

### AC 1 ‚Äî ISF implemented per its descriptor (single-turn/2-STEP, fed session log + ticket graph, NOT agent); fires only when a session log is linked.

**MET.**

The previously-identified gap (no ticket-graph blob passed to the model) has been remediated:

- `_ticket_graph_blob(ctx)` is defined at `orchestrator.py:394‚Äì415`. It resolves parent, children, and dependency links from the already-loaded `PlanContext` state (not by fetching anything ‚Äî ISF stays single-turn and non-agentic).
- It is injected into `pass1_isf` at `orchestrator.py:682`: `ticket_graph=_ticket_graph_blob(ctx)`.
- `pass1_isf` (`passes.py:292‚Äì345`) accepts `ticket_graph: str = ""` (`passes.py:298`), renders it into the instructions block at `passes.py:306‚Äì316` (a labeled `## Ticket graph (pre-resolved ‚Ä¶)` section), and explicitly instructs the model to check the plan AND its ticket graph before flagging a silent drop.
- Non-agentic: `execution_mode="single_turn"` (`passes.py:326`) and `_agentic: False` (`passes.py:341`).
- Session-log gate: `orchestrator.py:673‚Äì689` ‚Äî ISF runs only when `log_text` is non-None; otherwise `coverage["isf"] = {"ran": False, "reason": "no linked session_log"}`.

### AC 2 ‚Äî Oversized-log fallback: documented SUMMARY + reduced confidence (never summarizes the plan).

**MET.**

- `_linked_session_log` (`orchestrator.py:418‚Äì451`) gates on a token budget and calls `passes.summarize_for_isf(runner, cfg, log_text=text)` when the log is oversized ‚Äî only the log text is passed, never the plan (`passes.py:348‚Äì360`).
- `_reduced_confidence=summarized` is tagged on every finding produced from a summarized log (`passes.py:342`).
- A note is appended to evidence: `"(ISF ran against a SUMMARY of an oversized session log)"` (`passes.py:333`).
- `coverage["isf"] = {"ran": True, "summarized": summarized}` is recorded (`orchestrator.py:674`).

### AC 3 ‚Äî Validated on labeled cases: catches a silently-descoped requirement (recall); no false-fire on honored/justified-descope plans.

**MET.**

`src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/plan-review-isf-finder.eval.yaml` exists with:
- Recall cases ISF-R1 (silent contradiction) and ISF-R2 (silent drop), both `expect: finding`.
- False-fire cases ISF-F1 (honored intent) and ISF-F2 (justified-descope), both `expect: pass`.
- Deterministic scorers `recall_on_silent_drop` and `no_fire_on_honored_or_justified_descope`.
- A gold set covering all four cases.
- Wired into the Inspect-AI eval seam (`prompt: plan-review-isf-finder`, `model: anthropic:claude-opus-4-8`).
